completed.title: WebChat UI: Input UX

Enter creates new line, Ctrl/Cmd+Enter sends
Hint text visible below input
Line breaks preserved in messages

Drag & drop files onto input area
Cmd/Ctrl+V paste screenshots from clipboard
Mixed text + image messages end-to-end working
Image thumbnails persist in message history

completed.title: WebChat UI: Bug Fixes & Polish
completed.summary: Fixed 8 bugs and added polish features for the Amy Webchat UI
details: Fixed multiline input disappearing (auto-resize bug)
Fixed messages not rendering after code blocks (HTML escaping)
Fixed message polling dying silently (undeclared variable)
Fixed copy button breaking on quotes/backticks
Fixed newlines lost in history (~~NL~~ ASCII marker workaround)
Fixed image attachments not sent to AI (gateway integration)
Fixed image thumbnails disappearing from history
Added system message styling (compact grey bars, click-to-expand)
Fixed voice recording: BlackHole virtual device auto-skip
Fixed base64 parsing for audio (codec params in MIME type)
